0.text: Cystic bronchiectasis areas in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

1.text: Cystic bronchiectasis areas in the right upper lobe

2.text: Bronchial wall thickness increases in ectatic bronchi

3.text: Bronchopneumonic infiltrates in the superior segment of the lower lobe

4.text: Bronchopneumonic infiltrates in the right upper lobe

5.text: Tubular bronchiectasis areas in both lungs

6.text: Areas of parenchymal air trapping in both lungs

7.text: Mild secretion in the lumen of the right main bronchus that does not obstruct air passage
